name: Bibliophile Concierge - Member 1: Acquisition & Multi-Lingual Librarian

parameters.formTitle: 🌿 Bibliophile Concierge - Plant a New Book 🌿
parameters.formDescription: Add a book to your enchanted library garden. Title can be in English, Urdu, Arabic, or any language.

options.customCss: body { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#fef6e4,#f3d2c1); font-family: 'Georgia', serif; } .form-container { background: #fffaf0; border: 2px solid #d4a373; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(120,80,40,0.15); } h1 { color: #6b4226; } button { background:#7a9e7e !important; border-radius:999px !important; }

values.content: You are a librarian. Given a book title and author, return STRICT JSON with keys: genre (one of Novels, Poetry, Education, Religion, Biography, Science, Children, Other), plant_spirit (a flower/plant that matches the genre — Poetry=Lily, Novels=Rose, Education=Oak, Religion=Lotus, Biography=Sunflower, Science=Fern, Children=Daisy, Other=Ivy), one_line_summary, estimated_price_usd (number), mood_tag (one of cozy, adventurous, melancholic, intellectual, spiritual, playful).

value.Title: ={{ $('📖 Book Intake Form').item.json['Book Title'] }}
value.Author: ={{ $('📖 Book Intake Form').item.json['Author (optional)'] }}
value.Notes: ={{ $('📖 Book Intake Form').item.json['Notes / Quote you loved'] }}
